name: Cannonball Crew
short_description: Cannonball Crew is a chaotic online pirate party game for 2 to 20 players, with support for up to 40 players. Battle with your friends or AI in this treasure hunting, sword fighting, and cannon fire madness!
detailed_description:
Multiplayer Pirate Party Mayhem With Friends

Cannonball Crew is a chaotic online party game where two teams face off in intense matches full of treasure hunting, sword showdowns, and cannon-fueled mayhem.

Perfect for online play with friends!

Recommended for 2 to 20 players, with support for up to 40. AI can fill in any empty spots.

Pick Your Path to Victory With Different Game Modes

Mix and match game modes to create the perfect chaotic pirate showdown for you and your friends. The team with the highest score when time runs out wins the match.

  • Team Deathmatch – Take out enemies to earn points for your team. Win fights, win points.

  • Bounty Hunt – Random players become high-value targets for a limited time. Take them out to receive bonus points before the opportunity vanishes.

  • Treasure Hunt – Search the map for treasure, hide it on your team's side to score, and defend it from rival pirates.

Weapons and Combat Mechanics

  • Capture – Send enemies to prison and earn clues about their hidden treasures — but beware, they’ll escape after a while or if a teammate sets them free.

  • Sword – Wield your sword to fend off enemies trying to capture or attack you.

  • Harpoon – Use the harpoon to pull yourself forward, drag enemies closer, or grab distant crates and treasures.

  • Cannon – Fire explosive cannonballs to clear your path and send foes flying!

Join the Cannonball Crew Now

From last-second treasure thefts to explosive battles, Cannonball Crew is packed with action, strategy, and laughs.

Gather your pirate friends!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
